title: SVC No Disconnect icon
description: This resource pack removes the persistent "disconnected" icon from the Simple Voice Chat mod. It’s a small visual tweak for players who find the icon distracting on unsupported servers.
body:
This resource pack hides the "disconnected" icon from the Simple Voice Chat mod. The icon usually appears on servers that don't support the mod and stays visible at all times, which can be distracting. If you find the icon unnecessary or annoying, this pack removes it for a cleaner interface.
No other visuals or features are changed - just a simple tweak for a better experience.


<details>
<summary>Before & After</summary>

Before:
![In-game screenshot without the texture pack; disconnected icon in the bottom left](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e283f60352093ece67bdf4dd3f50650603e5c86.png)

After:
![In-game screenshot with the texture pack; no disconnected icon in the bottom left](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/749163dca4cf1ae746556f91bff9ec37fe13d9cc.png)
Wow so beautiful! You have to download this pack too.

</details>
